prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large blue rubber sphere
  - obj_1: small green metal cube
  - obj_2: large brown rubber sphere
  - obj_3: small yellow rubber cube
  - obj_4: large yellow rubber cylinder
  - obj_5: small red rubber sphere
  - obj_6: large red metal sphere
  - obj_7: large purple rubber cube
  - obj_8: large yellow rubber cube

Questions:
[qrr_0241] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0242] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0243] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0244] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0245] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0246] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0247] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0248] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0249] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0250] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0251] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0252] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0253] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0254] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0255] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0256] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0257] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0258] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0259] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0260] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the scene and answer distance comparison questions.

Let me identify the approximate positions of each object:
- obj_0 (large blue rubber sphere): right side, middle depth
- obj_1 (small green metal cube): left-center, front
- obj_2 (large brown rubber sphere): center
- obj_3 (small yellow rubber cube): front-center
- obj_4 (large yellow rubber cylinder): right-center, front
- obj_5 (small red rubber sphere): front-right
- obj_6 (large red metal sphere): left-center, back
- obj_7 (large purple rubber cube): left, middle depth
- obj_8 (large yellow rubber cube): behind obj_3, but wait - looking at the image again...

Let me re-examine. The objects I see:
- Purple cube (obj_7): far left, back
- Green metal cube (obj_1): left, front
- Yellow cube front (obj_3): front-center
- Red metal sphere (obj_6): left-center, back
- Yellow cube back (obj_8): behind, back-right area
- Brown sphere (obj_2): center
- Red rubber sphere (obj_5): right-front
- Yellow cylinder (obj_4): right, front-center
- Blue sphere (obj_0): far right

Now estimating distances for each question pair:

[qrr_0241] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_3-obj_7: obj_1 is front-left, obj_8 is back-right (large distance). obj_3 is front-center, obj_7 is back-left (moderate distance). I think obj_1-obj_8 > obj_3-obj_7. Answer: >

[qrr_0242] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_5: obj_4-obj_5 is right area, relatively close. obj_1-obj_8 seems larger. Answer: >

[qrr_0243] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_6: obj_4 is right, obj_6 is back-left (large distance). Comparing with obj_1-obj_8... roughly similar or obj_4-obj_6 larger. Answer: <

[qrr_0244] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_7: obj_4 right, obj_7 far left (large distance). obj_1-obj_8 might be similar. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0245] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_5-obj_6: obj_5 front-right, obj_6 back-left (large distance). obj_1-obj_8 similar. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0246] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_5-obj_7: obj_5 front-right, obj_7 back-left (large distance). Answer: <

[qrr_0247] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_6-obj_7: obj_6 and obj_7 are both back-left, close together. obj_1-obj_8 is larger. Answer: >

[qrr_0248] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_4-obj_5: both moderate distances. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0249] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_4-obj_6: obj_4-obj_6 is large. Answer: <

[qrr_0250] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_4-obj_7: obj_4-obj_7 large. Answer: <

[qrr_0251] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_4-obj_8: obj_4 right, obj_8 back-center. moderate. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0252] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_5-obj_6: obj_5-obj_6 large. Answer: <

[qrr_0253] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_5-obj_7: obj_5-obj_7 large. Answer: <

[qrr_0254] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_5-obj_8: moderate distances. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0255] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_6-obj_7: obj_6-obj_7 close. Answer: >

[qrr_0256] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_6-obj_8: obj_6-obj_8 moderate. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0257] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_7-obj_8: obj_7-obj_8 moderate. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0258] obj_2-obj_4 vs obj_3-obj_5: both moderate. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0259] obj_2-obj_4 vs obj_3-obj_6: obj_3-obj_6 large. Answer: <

[qrr_0260] obj_2-obj_4 vs obj_3-obj_7: obj_3-obj_7 moderate-large. Answer: <
